Impact Architecture

Imae
OS

A concept operating system for turning care, contribution, and local wisdom into measurable value — designed to support community resilience without reducing generosity into competition.

View Architecture Discuss Collaboration
Imae Engine
AI · Ledger · Community Pool
AI Mission GeneratorTranslate community needs into clear, actionable missions.
Matching EngineMatch skills, distance, urgency, and intention.
Contribution ProofVerify activity with timestamp, location, and evidence.
Credit CirculationReward contribution while discouraging value hoarding.
01 — Problem to solution

From extraction
to generative value

Imae OS frames contribution as infrastructure: not charity, not points for status, but a practical system that helps resources circulate back to where they are needed.

Extractive Economy
  • Community resources are often fragmented.
  • Contribution is difficult to see, verify, or reward fairly.
  • Value can be hoarded instead of circulated.
  • Vulnerable people may be left without timely support.
→
Generative Economy
  • AI matches needs with people who can help.
  • Proof of Contribution records meaningful action.
  • Credit has circulation logic to prevent hoarding.
  • Community Pool redirects value to care and resilience.
02 — Strategic pillars

Three pillars of
Imae OS

1

AI-driven value & real-time matching

Analyze community needs and match them with people based on skills, location, urgency, and intention.

AI MatchingReal-timeNLP
2

Fair credit & circulation

Use digital credit, smart escrow, expiration logic, and a community pool to keep value moving.

Anti-hoardingEscrowLedger
3

Community resilience

Support elders, families, and vulnerable groups through care signals, local networks, and incentive design.

Safety netCare multiplierAnomaly AI
03 — System architecture

How the system
flows

The architecture connects community signals, user capacity, verified action, and impact outputs.

Input 1 · Community DataHealth, utility, public calendar, local needs, and sensor signals.
Input 2 · User ProfileSkills, intention, availability, behavior pattern, and location.
Input 3 · Activity ProofCompleted mission with timestamp, photo, and location evidence.

Imae Engine

Generates missions, verifies actions, issues credit, and redistributes value through the Community Pool.

Output 1 · MissionClear task sent to the right person in the right area.
Output 2 · CreditDigital credit with circulation and expiration logic.
Output 3 · SafetyCare alert when abnormal patterns suggest someone may need help.
04 — Credit lifecycle

Designed against
accumulation

01

Action

A user completes a mission such as elder care, local repair, or community support.

Proof of Contribution
02

Activation

The system verifies evidence and activates credit, with a portion directed to the Community Pool.

Community Pool
03

Circulation

Credit can be used for resources or locked toward a goal through smart escrow.

7–30 day logic
04

Recycle

Unused credit returns to the pool so value continues to circulate.

Auto-recycle
05 — Human-in-the-loop

AI that learns
with people

The system begins with strong human review, then gradually moves toward higher autonomy only when confidence and safety are proven.

1

Human review

Curators review every AI-proposed mission and train the system through feedback.

Month 1–3100% Review
2

Assisted approval

High-confidence missions can be approved faster while edge cases remain human-supervised.

Month 4–6Hybrid
3

Monitored autonomy

AI runs routine matching while people monitor anomalies, ethics, and community feedback.

Month 7+Governed AI
06 — Impact matrix

Impact across
economy, society, and mind

Economic Impact

  • Reduce inequality through anti-accumulation logic.
  • Support access to resources without creating debt.
  • Stimulate local circulation of value.

Social Impact

  • Build safety nets for elders and vulnerable people.
  • Strengthen family and community care.
  • Make local skills visible and usable.

Psychological Impact

  • Create self-worth through verified contribution.
  • Turn burden into positive agency.
  • Reduce isolation through meaningful participation.

Build technology
that serves humanity.

Imae OS is an impact architecture concept for strategic collaboration, pilot design, and community-based innovation.
